products.name: Eternal Gopi Raas
products.desc: This masterpiece captures the Raas Leela, the joyful dance of Shri Krishna with the Gopis in the moonlit groves of Vraj.

fullInfo.materials: Natural stone pigments, 24-karat gold leaf, hand-woven cotton canvas
fullInfo.story: The composition is built around the sacred moonlit rasa dance and uses a layered palette of indigo, emerald, and saffron to evoke the spiritual energy of Braj.

products.name: Royal Peacock Vanam
products.desc: The peacock, a symbol of royalty and monsoon's grace, is depicted here amongst blooming lotuses.

fullInfo.materials: Lapis blue, cinnabar red, malachite green, hand-applied gold
fullInfo.story: The painting celebrates the arrival of monsoon and the symbolic elegance of the peacock, linking the divine court of Krishna to the natural splendor of Rajasthan.

products.name: Sacred Annakut Utsav
products.desc: A grand celebration in Nathdwara where a mountain of food is offered to Shri Nath Ji.

fullInfo.materials: Mineral pigments, 24-karat gold leaf, cotton canvas
fullInfo.story: Annakut is one of the most vibrant festivals in Nathdwara, and this work captures the scale, devotion, and abundance of the celebration in a richly ornamented composition.

products.name: Gowardhan Cow Heritage
products.desc: Cows are central to the Pichwai tradition, representing the Kamadhenu and the pastoral abundance of Braj.

fullInfo.materials: Stone pigments, hand-laid gold leaf, natural gum binding
fullInfo.story: The painting reveres the sacred cow as a symbol of prosperity and divine care, rendered with calm dignity and strong devotional presence.
